Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
Notes: Falcone.com has completed strategic SEO updates to improve search visibility and overall performance, with a primary focus on enhancing Google Rich Results and AI-driven search presence. A key improvement includes the successful implementation and optimization of JSON-LD Schema markup, strengthening the website’s structured data to ensure more accurate indexing and improved content interpretation by search engines. During this update, structured data configuration issues were identified and resolved, enhancing eligibility for rich snippets and advanced search features. These fixes and enhancements collectively improve crawl efficiency, search result appearance, and ranking potential. As a result, Falcone.com has strengthened both its traditional SEO performance and its competitive positioning within AI-powered search environments, supporting continued digital growth and long-term online visibility.

Title: My SEO - Level 2 Agreement
Notes:
DrFace.com has recently undergone a comprehensive SEO and technical optimization phase aimed at enhancing search visibility, website performance, and user experience. Key improvements include resolving broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, streamlining site navigation, and implementing advanced caching techniques to ensure faster page load times. The website now also benefits from proper analytics tracking and an optimized XML sitemap to improve search engine indexing.

Additionally, JSON-LD Schema markup has been added to enhance the site's chances for Google Rich Results and emerging AI-driven search features. SMTP and form configurations are complete, with the email delivery system nearing final activation.

The next phase will address remaining crawl issues and further refine the website's architecture for greater efficiency and usability. To support sustained digital growth, a structured six-month blog content plan has been introduced. This plan focuses on creating targeted SEO content, optimizing for local search, highlighting services, sharing industry insights, featuring team spotlights, and conducting annual performance reviews to consistently drive organic traffic and strengthen user engagement.
